metadata.description: Ravi Teja Palanki's second brain — installable. A top-0.1% AI PM by depth, a smart human across every domain by breadth. 80 skills (1 orchestrator v1.4.0 + 62 AI PM skills across 7 specialist layers + 17 general-purpose) and 11 slash commands. AI PM is where the expertise runs deepest; the same thinking discipline applies to any question (code review, finance, history, design, life decisions) — research first, push back when wrong, end with what to do Monday morning.

plugins.name: rtp-personal-skills
plugins.description: The complete RTP skill library: rtp-aipm-orchestrator (v1.4.0, always on) + 62 AI PM skills across 7 specialist layers (thinking-core, product-sense, ai-strategy, safety-and-trust, agent-design, eval-and-quality, craft) + 17 general-purpose skills + 11 slash commands including /rtp-setup.
